rating.title: Player Ratings 🏆
rating.ratingСalculationDescription: Player ratings are based on a modified ELO system and serve as an objective and transparent measure of skill. Every participant starts with a base value of 1200 points, which changes after each game: a win adds points, a loss subtracts points, and a draw leaves the rating unchanged. For the first 30 games, an increased coefficient (K = 40) is applied to more quickly establish the player's true level; thereafter, the standard coefficient (K = 20) is used. Upon reaching 2400 or higher, the coefficient is reduced to K = 10, ensuring more stable rating changes for experienced players. The value is always rounded and cannot be lower than 0.
rating.playerRatingsDescription: Players are ranked in the table according to their current rating. If several participants have the same number of points, they may share the same place, reflecting the equality of their skill levels. Thus, the rating not only shows individual progress but also determines a player's position among the other participants in the system.

about.title: Team
about.titleDescription: the team that worked on the project
about.projectDeveloped: The project was developed by a team of 3 people as part of the final project of the
about.mentoringSupport: with mentoring support. Learning to apply the values of courage, focus, commitment, respect, and openness, the team found solutions in non-standard situations while maintaining clarity of goals and mutual trust. Transparent task tracking and openness in communication ensured timely adjustment of priorities and high responsibility for everyone.
about.publicStand: The project is deployed on a public stand and is accompanied by a backlog of improvements: expansion of functionality, performance optimization, implementation of analytics and monitoring. The experience gained has strengthened the skills of team development, architectural thinking and quality practices, and the created product is ready for further scaling and support.
